problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Quantum annealing for optimization problems may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
